title: integ-test-runner output
description: Canonical machine-readable output contract for the integ-test-runner role. See agents/integ-test-runner.md Step 4 for the prose contract this mirrors.

deployedSha.description: The deploy-verified git commit part 2 (smoke test) actually ran against. Optional for backward compatibility, but an orchestrator that supplied a deployed SHA in the dispatch prompt treats a missing or mismatching value as INCONCLUSIVE evidence (never a pass). See integ-test-runner.md 'Part-2 evidence freshness'.
